base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_relic_bag — a pickup_item (power_item) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Relic bag — container item. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Relic bag — container item; holds body-parts or crystals after acquisition. Shown at sheet bottom
